name: 16.9oz Ribbed Stemmed Cassin Wine Glass - Threshold™
description:
Add a touch of refinement to every sip with this Ribbed Stemmed Cassin Wine Glass from Threshold™. Made of glass, this Cassin wine glass feature a ribbed texture that gives your drinks an eye-catching look. With a capacity of 16.9 fluid ounces, this dishwasher-safe glass is perfect for your red, white or sparkling wines.

Threshold™: Looks like home, feels like you.
